LIMIT 1
2026-04-02 14:07:51.144 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@userId='019cc398-12f6-72d0-90d6-aa7499812a8d'], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='600']
SELECT r.name
FROM identity.user_roles AS u
